_comment: Routing & non-secret config for the xray-test-suite skill. Copy this file to config.json and fill in your tenant/project values. Real secrets belong in ~/.claude/.xray-credentials.json (see credentials.sample.json).

xrayImport.url: <full Xray import-tests-page URL with project.key & project.id query params>

customFields._comment: Field IDs vary per Jira tenant. Find them at: /rest/api/3/field on your Jira instance.

linkTypes._note: Issue link type used by Step 8.1.a to create the 'is tested by' link from Epic to Test. Default 'Test' (inward='is tested by', outward='tests') works on standard Jira Cloud tenants. Override if your tenant uses 'Epic-Test Link' (inward='Epic Tested By') or another custom variant. Discover available types via mcp__atlassian__getIssueLinkTypes.

templates.testStepTemplateKey: <JIRA_KEY of canonical Xray test, e.g. FIFAGEN-99999>
templates._comment: Jira issue key for a canonical Xray test whose steps demonstrate the team's step-shape rules. The Step 4.5 reviewer agent fetches this each run via mcp__atlassian__getJiraIssue + Xray /api/v2/test/<KEY>/steps to derive the canonical step shape (verb-first actions, measurable expected results). Leave the placeholder if reviewer.enabled = false.

reviewer._note: Step 4.5 — automated test-case-reviewer agent. enabled=false falls back to the original manual APPROVE gate at Step 4. severityThreshold in {Critical, High, Medium, Low} — issues below this severity are noted but do not trigger another refinement iteration. After maxIterations rounds the user is escalated with options to accept gaps, accept specific TC IDs, force one more iteration, or abort.
